ex_cn: 关于他第一次参加大联盟棒球比赛，他唯一记得的就是赛后见到了他的偶像威利·梅斯。

ex_en: The stories are taken from Chinese history, tales and literature.
ex_cn: 这些故事取材于中国的历史、传说和文学。

ex_en: Chinese culture has great attraction for people both at home and abroad.
ex_cn: 中国文化对海内外的人们都有着巨大的吸引力。

ex_en: But thanks to the help of my deskmate, she helped me make a grammar study schedule and helped me with grammar every week.
ex_cn: 但多亏了我的同桌，她帮我制定了一份语法学习计划，每周都辅导我语法。

cn:
n. 层
v. 分层堆积

n. 意大利人，意大利语
adj. 意大利的，意大利语的

ex_en: Frogs are needed in the food chain as food for animals like snakes, birds and fish.
ex_cn: 青蛙是食物链中不可或缺的一环，是蛇、鸟、鱼等动物的食物。

ex_en: Record the progress of the waste separation programme in the neighbourhood.
ex_cn: 记录社区垃圾分类项目的进展情况。

cn:
n. 冒险，冒险经历
v. 冒险
ex_en: Let's make reading an exciting adventure.
ex_cn: 让我们把阅读变成一次激动人心的冒险。

ex_en: The design features a traditional Chinese landscape with mountains, waterfalls, and pine trees, symbolizing harmony between nature and humanity.
ex_cn: 设计以传统中国山水为特色，有山、瀑布和松树，象征着人与自然的和谐。

ex_en: Scientists at the University of Bonn in Germany recently ran the mark test on roosters.
ex_cn: 德国波恩大学的科学家最近在公鸡身上做了镜子测试。

ex_en: The visit left a lasting impression on those foreign visitors.
ex_cn: 这次访问给那些外国客人留下了持久的印象。

cn:
n. 非洲人
adj. 非洲的，非洲人的
ex_en: When was the project started by the African Union?
ex_cn: 这个项目是非洲联盟什么时候启动的？

ex_en: A boy who lives in a city with an orderly street network.
ex_cn: 一个生活在街道布局有序的城市里的男孩。

ex_en: But it is not a perfect sport because of the risk of injury.
ex_cn: 但它并不是一项完美的运动，因为存在受伤的风险。

cn:
n. 难题，迷惑
v. 使困惑，使为难
ex_en: Huarong Pass is a traditional Chinese block-moving puzzle.
ex_cn: 华容道是一种传统的中国推块解谜游戏。

ex_en: In comparison, my run two days ago was 8.6 km in 46 minutes with 483 calories burnt.
ex_cn: 相比之下，我两天前跑了8.6公里用时46分钟，消耗了483卡路里。

ex_en: Everyone has the ability to enjoy 31 and laughter, no matter who they are or where they come from.
ex_cn: 无论是谁，来自何方，每个人都有享受快乐和笑声的能力。

cn:
n. 理想，典范
adj. 理想的，完美的

ex_en: A must-watch if you want to discover the beauty of the grassland and life there," another fan said.
ex_cn: “如果你想发现草原之美和那里的生活，这部剧是必看的。”另一位粉丝说。

cn:
n. 东北
adj. 东北的

n. 叹息
v. 叹息

ex_en: However, the bay width, which means the distance between two columns, could be 58.
ex_cn: 然而，开间——也就是两根柱子之间的距离——可以是58。

cn:
n. 双胞胎中一人
adj. 双胞胎的，成对的
ex_en: Bedrooms: single, twin or double rooms.
ex_cn: 卧室：单人间、双床间或大床间。

ex_en: Drones also provide convenience for the public.
ex_cn: 无人机也为公众提供了便利。

ex_en: Everything is free, but donations are greatly welcome.
ex_cn: 所有物品都是免费的，但非常欢迎捐赠。

ex_en: What a good supper he gave me that night!
ex_cn: 那天晚上他给我做的晚餐真是棒极了！

cn:
n. 周刊，周报
adj. 每周的，一周一次的

ex_en: First, working as an animal behaviour.
ex_cn: 首先，作为一名动物行为研究员来工作。

ex_en: Ethnic-themed travel photography has also become very popular in the ethnic village, following homestays and restaurants.
ex_cn: 继民宿和餐馆之后，民族主题旅拍在民族村里也变得非常流行。

cn:
n. 进步，前进
v. 前进

ex_en: But confidence building comes with being able to do more in our day-to-day life, experiencing less pain and more freedom in movement, and feeling good after a workout.
ex_cn: 但建立自信伴随着能够在日常生活中做更多的事，感到更少的疼痛和更多的行动自由，以及锻炼后的良好感觉。

cn:
n. 记录
v. 登记；注册

n. 代码，密码
v. 把...编码
ex_en: Please enter the code to open the classroom door.
ex_cn: 请输入密码打开教室的门。

ex_en: Most birds are active in the daytime.
ex_cn: 大多数鸟类在白天活跃。

ex_en: Have you ever heard of Hainan Tropical Rainforest National Park?
ex_cn: 你听说过海南热带雨林国家公园吗？

ex_en: This section has beautiful scenery and is less crowded.
ex_cn: 这个区域风景秀丽，人也不那么拥挤。

cn: n. 灵感，鼓舞人心的人或物
ex_en: Kendall is an inspiration to other kids too.
ex_cn: 肯德尔也激励了其他孩子。

cn: n. 西南 adj. 西南的

ex_en: There is a lot of preparation to do.
ex_cn: 有很多准备工作要做。
